code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    count = count
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if n > 0
  match string.byte_at(input, n - 1)
  when Some(last)
    if last != 10
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    count = count
  end
end

print("lines=#{count}")
